payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Glossy dark brown leather couch with vertical channel-padded back, visible stitched seams and creasing, padded armrests with built-in cup holders; right side and parts of the back are cropped at the image edge — approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark brown leather couch, partial","long_description":"Glossy dark brown leather couch with vertical channel-padded back, visible stitched seams and creasing, padded armrests with built-in cup holders; right side and parts of the back are cropped at the image edge — approximately 1.2 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown","leather upholstery","glossy finish","vertical channel tufting","visible stitching","padded armrests","built-in cup holder","edge-cropped/right-side partial","worn creasing"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
